title: Coda AI ties connected data, summarization, and AI tasks together
claim: Coda AI combines connected knowledge assistance, summarization, extraction, writing help, and AI task assistance over a large integration surface.
source_snippet: Reference, summarize, extract, and automate repetitive work across connected data.
implication: ProductOS should unify retrieval, synthesis, and task execution over workspace evidence instead of treating them as separate features.
followup_questions: Which ProductOS research tasks should be one-click templates versus free-form agent runs?
